title: rosa pouzinii var. mauritii
intro: Rosa pouzinii var. mauritii, also known as the 'Mauritius rose', is a variety of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to the island of Réunion. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health issues, including wounds and infections. The health benefits of Rosa pouzinii var. mauritii include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal properties.
